creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Thu Jan  2 12:42:28 2014
New Revision: 338437
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338437

Log:
  www/py-django-simple-captcha: update to 0.4.1
  
  - Update to 0.4.1 [1]
  - Switch from easy_install to install
  - Use python auto plist
  
  PR:		ports/185406 [1]
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Deleted:
  head/www/py-django-simple-captcha/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/www/py-django-simple-captcha/Makefile
  head/www/py-django-simple-captcha/distinfo

Modified: head/www/py-django-simple-captcha/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-simple-captcha/Makefile	Thu Jan  2 11:27:14 2014	(r338436)
+++ head/www/py-django-simple-captcha/Makefile	Thu Jan  2 12:42:28 2014	(r338437)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	django-simple-captcha
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.0
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.1
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -17,7 +17,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}djan
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}six>=1.2.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-six
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
-PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	${PORTNAME:S/-/_/g}
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/www/py-django-simple-captcha/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-django-simple-captcha/distinfo	Thu Jan  2 11:27:14 2014	(r338436)
+++ head/www/py-django-simple-captcha/distinfo	Thu Jan  2 12:42:28 2014	(r338437)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (django-simple-captcha-0.4.0.tar.gz) = 9a09294da01e9c3205f08604fc25fd54423b31b1b3c882427605d22e8d6ee291
-SIZE (django-simple-captcha-0.4.0.tar.gz) = 60285
+SHA256 (django-simple-captcha-0.4.1.tar.gz) = caa194d5b7ea0cbcb69a797daaebae72d34a9ca32bfafddd08ead8e87bd7ef46
+SIZE (django-simple-captcha-0.4.1.tar.gz) = 60775
